requirement_topic.en: Panama Grid Connection for BESS — 60 Hz System, ASEP Interconnection Requirements, and Distributor Technical Agreements
requirement_topic.zh: 巴拿马BESS并网——60 Hz系统、ASEP互联要求及配电公司技术协议
requirement_topic.zht: 巴拿馬BESS併網——60 Hz系統、ASEP互聯要求及配電公司技術協議

summary.en: Panama's electricity sector is regulated by the Autoridad Nacional de los Servicios Públicos (ASEP) and guided at a policy level by the Secretaría Nacional de Energía (SNE). Grid-connected BESS installations require coordination with ASEP and with the relevant electricity distributor: EDEMET (Empresa de Distribución Eléctrica Metro-Oeste) and EDECHIS (Empresa de Distribución Eléctrica Chiriquí) in the west, and ENSA (Empresa de Distribución Eléctrica Norte) in the north and central regions. Panama's national grid operates at 60 Hz and uses the North American voltage system: 120/240 V single-phase and 120/208 V or 277/480 V three-phase for commercial and industrial installations. BESS power conversion systems (PCS) — bidirectional inverters — must be designed, configured, firmware-updated, and validated specifically for Panama's 60 Hz / 120–240 V grid. Chinese BESS products are typically designed and validated for China's 50 Hz / 220–380 V grid; firmware reconfiguration of the PCS and corresponding protection relay settings are required before interconnection testing in Panama. Panama's interconnection technical requirements are established through project-level agreements with the relevant distributor and ASEP; publicly accessible comprehensive BESS-specific interconnection technical specifications had not been confirmed from official sources as of the dataset date — direct engagement with ASEP and the relevant distributor at the earliest project stage is essential.
summary.zh: 巴拿马电力行业由公共服务国家管理局（ASEP）监管，政策层面由国家能源秘书处（SNE）指导。并网BESS装置须与ASEP及相关配电公司协调：西部地区为EDEMET（都市西区配电公司）和EDECHIS（奇里基配电公司），北部及中部地区为ENSA（北部配电公司）。巴拿马国家电网运行频率为60 Hz，采用北美电压体系：单相120/240 V，商业和工业装置三相为120/208 V或277/480 V。BESS储能变流器（PCS）——双向逆变器——须专门针对巴拿马60 Hz / 120–240 V电网进行设计、配置、固件更新和验证。中国BESS产品通常针对中国50 Hz / 220–380 V电网进行设计和验证；在巴拿马进行并网测试前，须对PCS进行固件重新配置，并相应调整保护继电器定值。巴拿马的并网技术要求通过与相关配电公司和ASEP签订的项目级协议确立；截至本数据集日期，尚未从官方来源确认公开发布的BESS专项并网综合技术规范——在项目最早阶段直接与ASEP和相关配电公司接触至关重要。
summary.zht: 巴拿馬電力行業由公共服務國家管理局（ASEP）監管，政策層面由國家能源秘書處（SNE）指導。併網BESS裝置須與ASEP及相關配電公司協調：西部地區為EDEMET（都市西區配電公司）和EDECHIS（奇里基配電公司），北部及中部地區為ENSA（北部配電公司）。巴拿馬國家電網運行頻率為60 Hz，採用北美電壓體系：單相120/240 V，商業和工業裝置三相為120/208 V或277/480 V。BESS儲能變流器（PCS）——雙向逆變器——須專門針對巴拿馬60 Hz / 120–240 V電網進行設計、配置、韌體更新和驗證。中國BESS產品通常針對中國50 Hz / 220–380 V電網進行設計和驗證；在巴拿馬進行併網測試前，須對PCS進行韌體重新配置，並相應調整保護繼電器定值。巴拿馬的併網技術要求通過與相關配電公司和ASEP簽訂的項目級協議確立；截至本數據集日期，尚未從官方來源確認公開發布的BESS專項併網綜合技術規範——在項目最早階段直接與ASEP和相關配電公司接觸至關重要。

standards_or_laws: ASEP (Autoridad Nacional de los Servicios Públicos) — electricity sector regulator; interconnection approval authority for grid-connected generation and storage in Panama
Secretaría Nacional de Energía (SNE) — national energy policy authority; Panama Plan Energético Nacional 2015–2050

IEC 62933-2-1:2017+AMD1:2021 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Unit Parameters and Testing Methods — General Specification (expected project-specification reference for utility-scale BESS in Panama)
IEC 62933-5-2 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements — Electrochemical-based systems (expected project-specification reference)
Panama grid parameters: 60 Hz, 120/240 V single-phase, 120/208 V or 277/480 V three-phase (North American system)

summary.en: China's grid-connection requirements for BESS are governed by GB/T 36558-2023 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems) and GB/T 34120-2023 (Technical Specification for Electrochemical Energy Storage System Connected to Distribution Network). The PCS (energy storage converter) is assessed under NB/T 42090-2016 (Technical Code for Testing of Energy Storage Converters). China's grid operates at 50 Hz, 220/380 V (220 V single-phase, 380 V three-phase). This is fundamentally different from Panama's 60 Hz / 120–240 V North American system. PCS firmware, protection relay settings, transformer specifications, auxiliary load ratings, HVAC units, metering equipment, and control logic validated for China's 50 Hz / 220–380 V grid must be reconfigured, re-rated, and retested for Panama's 60 Hz / 120–240 V grid conditions before interconnection testing and commissioning. Chinese GB/T grid-connection certificates and NEA approvals are not transferable to Panama.
summary.zh: 中国BESS并网要求由GB/T 36558-2023（电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件）和GB/T 34120-2023（电化学储能系统接入配电网技术规范）管控。储能变流器（PCS）依据NB/T 42090-2016（储能变流器检测技术规程）进行评估。中国电网运行参数为50 Hz、220/380 V（单相220 V、三相380 V），与巴拿马60 Hz / 120–240 V北美电力体系存在根本性差异。针对中国50 Hz / 220–380 V电网验证的PCS固件、保护继电器定值、变压器规格、辅助负载额定值、HVAC设备、计量设备及控制逻辑，须在巴拿马并网测试和调试前重新配置、重新额定并重新测试。中国GB/T并网证书和NEA审批不可转用于巴拿马。
summary.zht: 中國BESS併網要求由GB/T 36558-2023（電力系統電化學儲能系統通用技術條件）和GB/T 34120-2023（電化學儲能系統接入配電網技術規範）管控。儲能變流器（PCS）依據NB/T 42090-2016（儲能變流器檢測技術規程）進行評估。中國電網運行參數為50 Hz、220/380 V（單相220 V、三相380 V），與巴拿馬60 Hz / 120–240 V北美電力體系存在根本性差異。針對中國50 Hz / 220–380 V電網驗證的PCS韌體、保護繼電器定值、變壓器規格、輔助負載額定值、HVAC設備、計量設備及控制邏輯，須在巴拿馬併網測試和調試前重新配置、重新額定並重新測試。中國GB/T併網證書和NEA審批不可轉用於巴拿馬。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 36558-2023 — 电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems)
GB/T 34120-2023 — 电化学储能系统接入配电网技术规范 (Technical Specification for Electrochemical Energy Storage System Connected to Distribution Network)
NB/T 42090-2016 — 储能变流器检测技术规程 (Technical Code for Testing of Energy Storage Converters)

gap.en: Critical gap: Panama's 60 Hz / 120–240 V North American grid system is fundamentally different from China's 50 Hz / 220–380 V system. Key gaps requiring attention: (a) frequency — Panama operates at 60 Hz; all Chinese BESS PCS firmware, protection settings, synchronisation parameters, and ride-through performance validated at 50 Hz must be reconfigured and retested at 60 Hz before interconnection; (b) voltage — Panama uses 120/240 V single-phase and 120/208 V or 277/480 V three-phase; Chinese BESS transformer specifications, PCS voltage protection thresholds, and auxiliary load equipment must be re-specified for Panama voltage levels; (c) ASEP / distributor interconnection agreement — engage ASEP and the relevant distributor (EDEMET, EDECHIS, or ENSA) at the earliest project stage to obtain interconnection technical requirements before equipment design is finalised; (d) IEC 62933 series evidence — where project specifications require IEC 62933-2-1 or IEC 62933-5-2 evidence, prepare test and design documentation accordingly; (e) SCADA / communication protocols — confirm the protocol required by the distributor for BESS monitoring and dispatch.
gap.zh: 关键差距：巴拿马60 Hz / 120–240 V北美电网体系与中国50 Hz / 220–380 V体系存在根本性差异。需关注的主要差距：（a）频率——巴拿马运行于60 Hz；所有在50 Hz下验证的中国BESS PCS固件、保护定值、同步参数及穿越性能，须在并网前重新配置并在60 Hz下重新测试；（b）电压——巴拿马单相使用120/240 V，三相使用120/208 V或277/480 V；中国BESS变压器规格、PCS电压保护阈值及辅助负载设备须重新针对巴拿马电压等级设计；（c）ASEP/配电公司并网协议——在设备设计最终确定前，应在项目最早阶段与ASEP及相关配电公司（EDEMET、EDECHIS或ENSA）接触以获取并网技术要求；（d）IEC 62933系列证据——若项目规格要求IEC 62933-2-1或IEC 62933-5-2证据，须相应准备测试和设计文件；（e）SCADA/通信协议——确认配电公司对BESS监控和调度所要求的协议。
gap.zht: 關鍵差距：巴拿馬60 Hz / 120–240 V北美電網體系與中國50 Hz / 220–380 V體系存在根本性差異。需關注的主要差距：（a）頻率——巴拿馬運行於60 Hz；所有在50 Hz下驗證的中國BESS PCS韌體、保護定值、同步參數及穿越性能，須在併網前重新配置並在60 Hz下重新測試；（b）電壓——巴拿馬單相使用120/240 V，三相使用120/208 V或277/480 V；中國BESS變壓器規格、PCS電壓保護閾值及輔助負載設備須重新針對巴拿馬電壓等級設計；（c）ASEP/配電公司併網協議——在設備設計最終確定前，應在項目最早階段與ASEP及相關配電公司（EDEMET、EDECHIS或ENSA）接觸以獲取併網技術要求；（d）IEC 62933系列證據——若項目規格要求IEC 62933-2-1或IEC 62933-5-2證據，須相應準備測試和設計文件；（e）SCADA/通訊協議——確認配電公司對BESS監控和調度所要求的協議。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — ASEP interconnection approval and distributor technical agreement are required for all grid-connected BESS in Panama; technical requirements are project-specific and defined in the interconnection agreement with the relevant distributor
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB/T 36558 and NEA grid-operator approval procedures are mandatory for grid-connected BESS in China; not transferable to Panama

source.publisher: Autoridad Nacional de los Servicios Públicos (ASEP), Panama

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB/T BESS grid-connection compliance and NEA approvals do not satisfy Panama's ASEP / distributor interconnection requirements. BESS PCS must be reconfigured and retested for Panama's 60 Hz / 120–240 V North American grid — both frequency and voltage are different from the Chinese 50 Hz / 220–380 V baseline. Engage ASEP and the relevant distributor (EDEMET, EDECHIS, or ENSA) at the earliest project stage to determine interconnection technical requirements, applicable IEC 62933 evidence, and SCADA / communication protocol specifications before equipment procurement is finalised.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB/T BESS并网合规和NEA审批不满足巴拿马ASEP/配电公司并网要求。BESS储能变流器须重新配置并针对巴拿马60 Hz / 120–240 V北美电网重新测试——频率和电压均与中国50 Hz / 220–380 V基准不同。应在设备采购最终确定前，在项目最早阶段与ASEP及相关配电公司（EDEMET、EDECHIS或ENSA）接触，确定并网技术要求、适用IEC 62933证据及SCADA/通信协议规格。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB/T BESS併網合規和NEA審批不滿足巴拿馬ASEP/配電公司併網要求。BESS儲能變流器須重新配置並針對巴拿馬60 Hz / 120–240 V北美電網重新測試——頻率和電壓均與中國50 Hz / 220–380 V基準不同。應在設備採購最終確定前，在項目最早階段與ASEP及相關配電公司（EDEMET、EDECHIS或ENSA）接觸，確定併網技術要求、適用IEC 62933證據及SCADA/通訊協議規格。
